tasks.subject: Task 1: Report state in GraphContext (TDD)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** `report.sections` lives in graph state with six `REPORT_*` reducer actions, correct persistence defaults, and no dropped keys anywhere (Bug #10).

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/context/GraphContext.js`
- Test: `src/context/GraphContext.report.test.js` (new)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `initialState`, `CLEAR`, `SET_GRAPH`, `migrateV1ToV2`, and the lazy initializer all produce/preserve a `report` key (default `{ sections: [] }`)
- [ ] `REPORT_ADD_BLOCK` upserts the section if missing and appends `{ id, text: '' }`
- [ ] `REPORT_UPDATE_BLOCK` / `REPORT_DELETE_BLOCK` touch only the targeted block
- [ ] `REPORT_SET_ORDER { themeIds }` rebuilds section order, materializing missing sections
- [ ] `REPORT_ADD_PULL_QUOTE` is idempotent per codeId; `REPORT_REMOVE_PULL_QUOTE` removes
- [ ] `DELETE_NODE` on a theme leaves its report section intact (tombstone data survives)
- [ ] Exported `withDefaults(parsed)` fills missing `regions`/`report` on old v2 saves and is used by the lazy initializer
- [ ] All 11 new tests pass; suite total 76; no existing test breaks

**Verify:** unit suite with dot-directory testMatch → `Test Suites: 6 passed` / `Tests: 76 passed`

**Steps:** TDD; full test file and implementation code in plan Task 1.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/context/GraphContext.js", "src/context/GraphContext.report.test.js"], "verifyCommand": "$env:CI=\"true\"; npx react-scripts test --watchAll=false --testMatch \"**/.claude/**/src/**/*.{spec,test}.{js,jsx,ts,tsx}\"", "acceptanceCriteria": ["report key everywhere incl. CLEAR/SET_GRAPH/migration/lazy-init", "six REPORT_* actions per plan semantics", "theme deletion preserves section", "withDefaults exported+used", "76 unit tests pass"], "implementerModel": "sonnet"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: reportUtils — pure chapter/inline/pull-quote helpers (TDD)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Dependency-free helpers the report components lean on: effective chapter derivation with auto-seeding + tombstones, bold/italic inline parsing, pull-quote resolution.

**Files:**
- Create: `src/utils/reportUtils.js`
- Test: `src/utils/reportUtils.test.js`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `effectiveSections(report, nodes)`: stored sections keep order with live `theme` attached; deleted-theme sections get `theme: null`; unstored themes appended in node order
- [ ] `parseInline(text)`: `**bold**`/`*italic*` tokens, unmatched markers literal, empty → `[]`
- [ ] `pullQuoteFor(codeId, nodes)`: live code → data, missing → tombstone
- [ ] No React/d3 imports; all 12 tests pass; suite total 88

**Verify:** unit suite with dot-directory testMatch → `Test Suites: 7 passed` / `Tests: 88 passed`

**Steps:** TDD; full test file and implementation in plan Task 2.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/utils/reportUtils.js", "src/utils/reportUtils.test.js"], "verifyCommand": "$env:CI=\"true\"; npx react-scripts test --watchAll=false --testMatch \"**/.claude/**/src/**/*.{spec,test}.{js,jsx,ts,tsx}\"", "acceptanceCriteria": ["effectiveSections order/tombstone/auto-seed semantics", "parseInline bold/italic/literal/empty", "pullQuoteFor live+tombstone", "no React/d3 imports", "88 unit tests pass"], "implementerModel": "sonnet"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: View wiring + ReportView shell (read-only chapters, empty state)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** A fourth "¶ Report" switcher entry mounts ReportView: auto-seeded chapters render read-only with the report typography, plus an empty state when no themes exist.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/components/Toolbar.js` (~line 97 switcher array + view doc comment)
- Modify: `src/App.js` (import, 4-way render branch, view comment)
- Create: `src/components/report/ReportView.js`
- Create: `src/components/report/ReportChapter.js`
- Test: `e2e/app.spec.js` (append test 29, seeding-only version — exact code in plan Task 3)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Switcher shows Wall · Graph · Sankey · Report; Report sets `aria-pressed="true"`; graph-only actions disable
- [ ] One `[data-testid="report-chapter"]` per theme, showing the theme label; auto-seed without render-time dispatch (via `effectiveSections`)
- [ ] Empty state when no themes and no stored sections
- [ ] `id="canvas-export-target"` + `data-testid="report-edit"` on the edit root; article 68ch / 17px / 1.6
- [ ] E2E test 29 passes; tests 22 and 26 stay green

**Verify:** `npx playwright test -g "Report view seeds chapters" --reporter=list` → `1 passed`

**Steps:** ReportView/ReportChapter contracts in plan Task 3; respect the locked interface list.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/components/Toolbar.js", "src/App.js", "src/components/report/ReportView.js", "src/components/report/ReportChapter.js", "e2e/app.spec.js"], "verifyCommand": "npx playwright test -g \"Report view seeds chapters\" --reporter=list", "acceptanceCriteria": ["4-view switcher with aria-pressed", "chapter per theme via effectiveSections", "empty state", "export-target id + typography", "e2e 29 + 22 + 26 green"], "implementerModel": "sonnet"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Report prose editing — blocks, blur-commit, chapter reorder
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Chapters become writable: add/edit/delete paragraphs (committed on blur — one undo entry per edit session) and reorder chapters.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/components/report/ReportView.js`, `src/components/report/ReportChapter.js`
- Test: `e2e/app.spec.js` (REPLACE test 29 with the extended version — exact code in plan Task 4)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Add paragraph → autofocused textarea; blur dispatches `REPORT_UPDATE_BLOCK` only when text changed; content survives view round-trip
- [ ] Escape in textarea cancels without saving
- [ ] Per-block delete (confirm) via `REPORT_DELETE_BLOCK`; new empty blocks open in textarea mode
- [ ] Click-to-edit on rendered paragraphs (`tabIndex=0`, `role="button"`, aria-label "Edit paragraph")
- [ ] ↑/↓ chapter reorder via `REPORT_SET_ORDER` (first/last disabled); order survives view switches
- [ ] `**bold**` renders as `<strong>` after blur
- [ ] Extended e2e 29 passes; unit suite stays 88

**Verify:** `npx playwright test -g "Report view seeds chapters" --reporter=list` → `1 passed`

**Steps:** Behavior contract in plan Task 4.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/components/report/ReportView.js", "src/components/report/ReportChapter.js", "e2e/app.spec.js"], "verifyCommand": "npx playwright test -g \"Report view seeds chapters\" --reporter=list", "acceptanceCriteria": ["blur-commit editing with no-op guard", "escape cancels", "add/delete blocks", "chapter reorder persists", "bold renders as strong", "e2e 29 extended green, 88 unit"], "implementerModel": "sonnet"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Report pull quotes — margin slots, tray, drag + click, tombstones
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Codes become pull quotes in each chapter's margin — dragged from a per-chapter tray or added via a click affordance — and removed codes degrade to tombstone notes.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/components/report/ReportChapter.js`
- Test: `e2e/app.spec.js` (append test 30 — exact code in plan Task 5)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Two-column chapter grid (1fr / 220px margin) in both modes
- [ ] Margin renders `pullQuoteIds` via `pullQuoteFor`: live blockquote (color left border, quote/label/source) or tombstone note; `data-testid="pull-quote"`
- [ ] Click affordance (`aria-label` "Add as pull quote: <label>") and HTML5 drag (dataTransfer `text/ta-code-id`) both dispatch `REPORT_ADD_PULL_QUOTE`; chips dim+disable once added
- [ ] Edit-mode remove button per quote (`REPORT_REMOVE_PULL_QUOTE`); everything editorial hidden in present mode
- [ ] Deleting the code in Graph view leaves a tombstone in the Report margin
- [ ] E2E test 30 passes; 88 unit green

**Verify:** `npx playwright test -g "pull quotes render and tombstone" --reporter=list` → `1 passed`

**Steps:** Behavior contract in plan Task 5; drag verified manually in preview (config `sankey-worktree`, port 3101).

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/components/report/ReportChapter.js", "e2e/app.spec.js"], "verifyCommand": "npx playwright test -g \"pull quotes render and tombstone\" --reporter=list", "acceptanceCriteria": ["margin slots with live+tombstone rendering", "click affordance + HTML5 drag both add", "remove button edit-only", "tombstone after code deletion", "e2e 30 green, 88 unit"], "implementerModel": "sonnet"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Present mode, wall mini-map, pull-quote motion, print export
tasks.description:
**Goal:** "▶ Present" opens a full-screen reading mode with a fixed mini-map that highlights the current theme's wall region while scrolling; pull quotes animate in; the PDF button prints the report through a print stylesheet.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/components/report/ReportView.js`, `src/components/report/ReportChapter.js`, `src/App.js` (handleExportPdf print path), `src/utils/motionConfig.js` (add `pullQuoteVariants`)
- Create: `src/components/report/ReportMiniMap.js`, `src/components/report/reportPrint.css`
- Test: `e2e/app.spec.js` (append test 31 — exact code in plan Task 6)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Present overlay REPLACES the edit article (edit chrome unmounts — e2e asserts zero "Add paragraph" buttons); exit pill + Escape (guarded listener) return to edit
- [ ] `ReportMiniMap` (`data-testid="report-minimap"`): static SVG of region rects in theme colors, active region emphasized (fillOpacity 0.55 / strokeWidth 6), code dots at wallPosition, null when no regions
- [ ] Active chapter tracked on scroll (last chapter with offsetTop <= scrollTop + viewport/3)
- [ ] Present-mode pull quotes animate via `pullQuoteVariants` + whileInView (once)
- [ ] `handleExportPdf`: `view === 'report'` → `window.print()`; other views unchanged
- [ ] E2E test 31 passes; e2e 29/30 stay green

**Verify:** `npx playwright test -g "present mode" --reporter=list` → `1 passed`

**Steps:** Contracts + exact CSS/variants code in plan Task 6; manual preview check of minimap highlight and print dialog.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/components/report/ReportView.js", "src/components/report/ReportChapter.js", "src/components/report/ReportMiniMap.js", "src/components/report/reportPrint.css", "src/App.js", "src/utils/motionConfig.js", "e2e/app.spec.js"], "verifyCommand": "npx playwright test -g \"present mode\" --reporter=list", "acceptanceCriteria": ["overlay replaces edit article", "minimap with active-region highlight", "scroll tracking", "pull-quote motion", "print PDF path for report view", "e2e 31 + 29 + 30 green"], "implementerModel": "sonnet"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: Phase-3 full-suite verification gate + docs (coordinator-run)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Prove the full unit suite (88 tests, 7 suites) and full E2E suite (31 tests) pass with all pre-existing tests green, production build compiles, and CLAUDE.md documents Phase 3.

> **USER-ORDERED GATE — NON-SKIPPABLE.** This task was requested by the user in the current conversation. It MUST NOT be closed by walking around it, by declaring it "verified inline", or by substituting a cheaper check. Close only after every item in `acceptanceCriteria` has been re-validated independently, with output captured.

**Files:**
- Modify: `CLAUDE.md`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Full unit suite output captured: `Test Suites: 7 passed` / `Tests: 88 passed` — no pre-existing test broken
- [ ] Full E2E suite output captured: `31 passed` — no pre-existing test broken
- [ ] `npm run build` compiles; `npx eslint src/components/report src/utils/reportUtils.js src/context/GraphContext.js --max-warnings 0` clean (pre-existing Canvas.js warning tracked separately)
- [ ] CLAUDE.md updated: commands (88 unit / 31 E2E), view row adds 'report', Key Files adds report/ + reportUtils.js, State Shape adds report, reducer actions list adds six REPORT_* actions, Export-ID bullet notes the report edit root, e2e count line
- [ ] All working-tree changes committed

**Verify:** unit suite with dot-directory testMatch → `Tests: 88 passed, 88 total`; `npx playwright test --reporter=list` → `31 passed`; `npm run build` → compiles

**Steps:** Coordinator-run — do NOT delegate the gate. Run + capture the three commands, eslint the new files, apply CLAUDE.md deltas per plan Task 7, commit.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["CLAUDE.md"], "verifyCommand": "$env:CI=\"true\"; npx react-scripts test --watchAll=false --testMatch \"**/.claude/**/src/**/*.{spec,test}.{js,jsx,ts,tsx}\"; npx playwright test --reporter=list; npm run build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["unit output captured: 7 suites / 88 tests passed", "e2e output captured: 31 passed, all pre-existing green", "build compiles + new files lint clean", "CLAUDE.md phase-3 deltas applied", "working tree committed"], "userGate": true, "tags": ["user-gate"], "implementerModel": "coordinator"}
```
